wpcs_compliance.analysis: 144-line function. Mixed tab/space indentation. No docblock. Very long function violates WP CS guidelines.

security.analysis: Static config but very large. Color defaults '#000000' and '#FFFFFF' are safe. Custom filter allows arbitrary config injection.

performance.analysis: 144 lines of array construction on every init. No caching. Acceptable for admin but heavy.

wp_api_usage.analysis: Correct apply_filters. But 'val' => 'alway' is a typo (should be 'always'). 'Alway show' grammar error.

code_quality.analysis: 144 lines, too long. Multiple typos: 'alway' vs 'always', 'Alway show' grammar. Repetitive color/border/shadow config patterns. No validation.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Relies on custom field types (onoff_radio, switcher_checkbox, slider, border, box_shadow) being available. Heavy framework dependency.

i18n.analysis: Uses __() extensively but 'Alway show' and 'Alway' are typos. 'desc' string concatenation with ' [default_value]' partially breaks i18n.

accessibility.analysis: Admin form config with hardcoded CSS widths. No aria labels. Color choices (black pager) may have contrast issues.

reasoning.key_observation: 144-line function with typos ('alway' vs 'always'), hardcoded CSS, and partial i18n breaks.

code: function include_script() { ?><script>(function($){$(document).ready(function(){if ($("input.enable_slider_pager:checked").val() == '1'){ $(".slider_pager_container").css( {'visibility': 'visible', 'height' : 'auto', 'overflow' : 'inherit'} ); } else { $(".slider_pager_container").css( {'visibility': 'hidden', 'height' : '0px', 'overflow' : 'hidden'} ); } $(document).on( "a3rev-ui-onoff_checkbox-switch", '.enable_slider_pager', function( event, value, status ) { $(".slider_pager_container").hide().css( {'visibility': 'visible', 'height' : 'auto', 'overflow' : 'inherit'} ); if ( status == 'true' ) { $(".slider_pager_container").slideDown(); } else { $(".slider_pager_container").slideUp(); } }); }); })(jQuery); </script> <?php }

wpcs_compliance.analysis: Inline script violates WP enqueue standards. PHP/JS mixed output.

security.analysis: Inline script, no nonce/capability checks. Raw jQuery without noConflict.

performance.analysis: Inline script blocks parsing. jQuery dependency not verified.

wp_api_usage.analysis: Violates wp_enqueue_script standard. Should use wp_add_inline_script.

code_quality.analysis: Contradictory visibility logic: hides then sets visible. Identical to Title include_script pattern.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Assumes jQuery and 'a3rev-ui-onoff_checkbox-switch' event exist.

i18n.analysis: JS toggles only, no user-facing strings.

accessibility.analysis: No aria-expanded, no keyboard support for toggle.

reasoning.key_observation: Inline JS with contradictory visibility logic; same pattern as Title include_script.

code: function __construct() { add_action( 'plugins_loaded', array( $this, 'init_form_fields' ), 1 ); $this->subtab_init(); $this->form_messages = array( 'success_message' => __( 'Shortcode Settings successfully saved.', 'a3-responsive-slider' ), 'error_message' => __( 'Error: Shortcode Settings can not save.', 'a3-responsive-slider' ), 'reset_message' => __( 'Shortcode Settings successfully reseted.', 'a3-responsive-slider' ), ); add_action( $this->plugin_name . '_set_default_settings' , array( $this, 'set_default_settings' ) ); add_action( $this->plugin_name . '-' . $this->form_key . '_settings_init' , array( $this, 'reset_default_settings' ) ); add_action( $this->plugin_name . '-'. $this->form_key.'_settings_start', array( $this, 'pro_fields_before' ) ); add_action( $this->plugin_name . '-'. $this->form_key.'_settings_end', array( $this, 'pro_fields_after' ) ); }

wpcs_compliance.analysis: Standard WP action hooks. Missing parent::__construct().

security.analysis: Action hooks from class properties. No user input.

performance.analysis: Multiple O(1) add_action calls. Normal WP pattern.

wp_api_usage.analysis: Correct action hook usage.

code_quality.analysis: Constructor does setup work. 'reseted' grammar error repeated.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Depends on plugin_name, form_key, subtab_init.

i18n.analysis: Uses __() but 'reseted' is incorrect. 'can not' should be 'cannot'.

reasoning.key_observation: Standard WP constructor; 'reseted' grammar error and 'can not' should be 'cannot'.
